title: selliguea brachypodia
intro: Selliguea brachypodia, also known as the Malaysian fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health issues due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selliguea brachypodia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Selliguea brachypodia can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
